# Charlotte Painting Pros

> Charlotte's 4.9-star painting contractor. Interior & exterior painting, cabinet refinishing & free color consultations. Licensed & insured. Serving Charlotte & surrounding NC.

Charlotte Painting Pros is a interior and exterior painting contractor serving Charlotte, NC and surrounding areas: Charlotte, Matthews, Huntersville, Concord, Gastonia.
Rated 4.9 stars across 103 reviews. Phone: (704) 555-0150. Website: https://charlottepaintingpros.com

## Services
- Interior Painting
- Exterior Painting
- Cabinet Refinishing
- Free Color Consultations

## Service Area
Charlotte, Matthews, Huntersville, Concord, Gastonia

## Frequently Asked Questions
### How much does it cost to paint a house interior in Charlotte?
Interior painting in Charlotte typically runs $2 to $6 per square foot, or roughly $2,000 to $6,000 for an average home depending on rooms, prep, and finish. We provide a free detailed quote.

### Do you offer free color consultations?
Yes. Charlotte Painting Pros includes a free color consultation to help you choose the perfect palette before we start.

### Are you licensed and insured painters?
Yes, we are fully licensed and insured, and every project is backed by our satisfaction guarantee.

### How long does it take to paint a house exterior?
Most exterior painting projects in Charlotte take 3 to 6 days depending on size, prep, and weather. Call (704) 555-0150 for a free estimate.

### How much does exterior house painting cost in Charlotte?
Exterior house painting in Charlotte often ranges from about $3,000 to $8,000 depending on home size, surface condition, trim, and how much prep work is needed. We provide a clear written estimate before scheduling.

### Do you paint cabinets in Charlotte?
Yes. We offer cabinet refinishing and cabinet painting for kitchens, bathrooms, and built-ins, including prep, sanding, and durable finish coats designed for daily use.

### What time of year is best for exterior painting in Charlotte?
Spring and fall are ideal for many Charlotte exterior painting projects because temperatures and humidity are more predictable, but we also schedule summer work when the forecast supports proper drying and curing.

## Contact
Call (704) 555-0150 for a free quote. Serving Charlotte and the surrounding region.
